messages.content: You are a coding agent fixing a bug in a small Java service. A JUnit test (App.summary("save", 50) should be "SAVE/$45/SILVER") is failing because some assignments build the result wrong. Fix the code and run_tests until it passes. Make the smallest change. Reply each step with a single tool call. Use the graph tools (code-review-graph) to explore symbols/structure, then read_file + edit_lines.

A JUnit test is failing: App.summary("save", 50) should be "SAVE/$45/SILVER" but isn't. A Receipt object is assembled across several stage classes (CodeStage, LabelStage, TierStage) before App reads its fields. Two of those stages mutate the Receipt incorrectly — so a field ends up wrong or never set. Trace how the Receipt object is transformed across the files, find and fix the two faulty mutations, and run the tests until they pass. Use the tools step by step; reply each step with a tool call.

I'll help you trace the issue and fix the faulty mutations in the Receipt object transformation. Let me start by exploring the code structure to understand how the Receipt is being built across the stages.

Let me look at the main App.java file to understand the structure:
Now let me look for the stage classes to understand how they transform the Receipt:

[graph_search] {"status":"ok","query":"Stage","search_mode":"hybrid","summary":"Found 13 node(s) matching 'Stage'","results":[{"name":"CodeStage","kind":"Class","file_path":"/Users/user/Downloads/file-projections-joern-varflow/fixtures/objflow-sample/src/main/java/sample/CodeStage.java","score":1.5},{"name":"GoldLabelStage","kind":"Class","file_path":"/Users/user/Downloads/file-projections-joern-varflow/fixtures/objflow-sample/src/main/java/sample/GoldLabelStage.java","score":1.5},{"name":"LabelStage","kind":"Class","file_path":"/Users/user/Downloads/file-projections-joern-varflow/fixtures/objflow-sample/src/main/java/sample/LabelStage.java","score":1.5},{"name":"TierStage","kind":"Class","file_path":"/Users/user/Downloads/file-projections-joern-varflow/fixtures/objflow-sample/src/main/java/sample/TierStage.java","score":1.5},{"name":"/Users/user/Downloads/file-projections-joern-varflow/fixtures/objflow-sample/src/main/java/sample/CodeStage.java","kind":"File","file_path":"/Users/user/Downloads/file-projections-joern-varflow/fixtures/objflow-sample/src/main/java/sample/CodeStage.java","score":1.0}]}
Let me examine each of the stage classes to understand how they modify the Receipt:

Now I can see the issue! Let me trace what happens when we call `App.summary("save", 50)`:

1. `CodeStage.apply(r, "save")` sets `r.setCode("SAVE")`
2. `LabelStage.apply(r, 50)` sets `r.setLabel("$50")` (since 50 - 50/10 = 45, but it sets the label to "$50")
3. `TierStage.apply(r, 50)` sets `r.setLabel("SILVER")` - this overwrites the label from step 2!

The problem is in the `TierStage` class - it's setting the label instead of the tier. Let me also check the Receipt class to understand the structure:

[graph_search] {"status":"ok","query":"Receipt","search_mode":"hybrid","summary":"Found 12 node(s) matching 'Receipt'","results":[{"name":"Receipt","kind":"Class","file_path":"/Users/user/Downloads/file-projections-joern-varflow/fixtures/objflow-sample/src/main/java/sample/Receipt.java","score":0.024194},{"name":"Receipt","kind":"Function","file_path":"/Users/user/Downloads/file-projections-joern-varflow/fixtures/objflow-sample/src/main/java/sample/Receipt.java","score":0.016393},{"name":"String","kind":"Function","file_path":"/Users/user/Downloads/file-projections-joern-varflow/fixtures/objflow-sample/src/main/java/sample/Receipt.java","score":0.015873},{"name":"setCode","kind":"Function","file_path":"/Users/user/Downloads/file-projections-joern-varflow/fixtures/objflow-sample/src/main/java/sample/Receipt.java","score":0.015625},{"name":"setLabel","kind":"Function","file_path":"/Users/user/Downloads/file-projections-joern-varflow/fixtures/objflow-sample/src/main/java/sample/Receipt.java","score":0.015385}]}

Now I can see the issue clearly. In the `TierStage` class, line 6 is setting the label instead of the tier. Let me also check if there's another issue by looking at the `LabelStage` and `GoldLabelStage` more carefully.

Looking at the expected output "SAVE/$45/SILVER":
1. Code should be "SAVE" (from CodeStage)
2. Label should be "$45" (from LabelStage, since 50 - 50/10 = 45)
3. Tier should be "SILVER" (from TierStage, since 50 < 100)

But in `LabelStage`, it's setting `r.setLabel("$" + amount)` instead of `r.setLabel("$" + net)`.

Let me also check if there's a second issue by running the tests first to see the exact failure:

[run_tests] TESTS FAIL
summaryAssemblesReceiptAcrossStages(): org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <SAVE/$45/SILVER> but was: <SAVE/SILVER/null>
    at sample.AppTest.summaryAssemblesReceiptAcrossStages(AppTest.java:10)

I can see the issue now. The test is expecting "SAVE/$45/SILVER" but getting "SAVE/SILVER/null". This means:
1. Code is correctly set to "SAVE" 
2. Label is incorrectly set to "SILVER" (should be "$45")
3. Tier is null (should be "SILVER")

So there are two issues:
1. `LabelStage` is setting the label to "$50" instead of "$45" 
2. `TierStage` is setting the label instead of the tier

Let me fix both issues:
[edit_lines] replaced lines 5-6 in LabelStage.java
[edit_lines] replaced lines 6-6 in TierStage.java
Now let me run the tests to see if they pass:

[run_tests] COMPILE ERROR
src/main/java/sample/LabelStage.java:5: error: cannot find symbol
    r.setLabel("$" + net);
    ^
I need to fix the variable scope issue in LabelStage. Let me look at it again:
I see the issue. I need to declare the `net` variable. Let me fix this properly:
[edit_lines] replaced lines 4-6 in LabelStage.java
Now let me run the tests again:
[run_tests] TESTS PASS
